sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 11.8g of fat. cholesterol adds to the tradeoff. for meats, fat quality matters a lot once the protein is already there.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 26.1g of protein. bioavailability and amino acid quality are both strong. strong protein is expected here, so the rest of the profile decides how high it climbs.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin b12 at 100% daily value, vitamin d at 0% daily value stand out most. that is major vitamin support.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin b12 at 100% daily value, vitamin d at 0% daily value stand out most. that is major vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: zinc at 39% daily value, iron at 15% daily value, potassium at 9% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.
sections.subtitleText: zinc at 39% daily value, iron at 15% daily value, potassium at 9% daily value stand out most. useful, but still not a major mineral edge.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: the upsides first: high satiety protein source because that is a major real-world strength for meat. complete protein delivery is reliable because the category is supposed to do this well. easy to centre a meal around because practical meal value matters.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: on the weaker side: fat quality can go sideways fast because some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up. cost and storage can be a pain because practical downsides still count. brings no fibre support because that leaves a nutrition gap the rest of the meal has to cover.

closing.summary: Lean Beef does have some solid upside. but the tradeoffs keep it from climbing higher. best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want efficient protein and can accept the category tradeoffs that come with it.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?

explanation.summary: Proteins are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
